assertionsTested.title: Remote read tools work
assertionsTested.reason: In stdio remote mode, get_spikes returned hosted API data matching authenticated curl GET /spikes for the namespaced seeded record.

seedSpike.command:
curl -sS -X POST http://localhost:8787/spikes -w "
HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data "{\"type\": \"page\", \"projectKey\": \"mcp-rerun-9d8a\", \"page\": \"mcp-rerun-9d8a-remote-read-1773147749.html\", \"url\": \"https://example.test/mcp-rerun-9d8a-remote-read-1773147749.html\", \"rating\": \"meh\", \"comments\": \"mcp-rerun-9d8a REMOTE_READ_MARKER 1773147749\", \"reviewer\": {\"id\": \"mcp-rerun-9d8a-reviewer\", \"name\": \"mcp-rerun-9d8a-reviewer\"}, \"viewport\": {\"width\": 1440, \"height\": 900}, \"timestamp\": \"2026-03-10T13:02:29Z\"}"

assertionsTested.title: Remote mode API unreachable
assertionsTested.reason: With an unreachable SPIKES_API_URL, read-tool call returned JSON-RPC error semantics (error object) instead of a successful result containing ERROR text.

error.message: Connection failed. Check your internet connection.

evidence.stderrTail:
[spikes-mcp] Starting MCP server on stdio (REMOTE mode)...
[spikes-mcp] Server stopped: Closed

assertionsTested.title: HTTP transport composes with remote
assertionsTested.reason: In HTTP transport + remote mode, MCP initialize/initialized/tools/call succeeded and get_spikes returned the hosted API seeded record over HTTP transport.

evidence.serverCommand: SPIKES_API_URL=http://localhost:8787 SPIKES_TOKEN=<assigned> HOME=/tmp/spikes-utv-mcp-rerun-9d8a/home /Users/moritzbierling/werk/repos/spikes/cli/target/debug/spikes mcp serve --transport http --remote --port 3848

initialize.command: curl -sS -D - -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3848/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" --data "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"initialize\", \"params\": {\"protocolVersion\": \"2024-11-05\", \"capabilities\": {}, \"clientInfo\": {\"name\": \"utv-mcp-rerun\", \"version\": \"1.0\"}}}"

initializedNotification.command: curl -sS -D - -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3848/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" --data "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"method\": \"notifications/initialized\", \"params\": {}}" -H "Mcp-Session-Id: c6deccdf-a8c1-4025-8a00-0c2862ea2b12"

toolCall.command: curl -sS -D - -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3848/ -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" --data "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 2, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"get_spikes\", \"arguments\": {\"page\": \"mcp-rerun-9d8a-remote-read-1773147749.html\"}}}" -H "Mcp-Session-Id: c6deccdf-a8c1-4025-8a00-0c2862ea2b12"
